Registered Properties Overview

Quick Actions

Hotels & Properties

Manage all hotel listings, status toggles, featured properties, and owners.

Hotel Name City/District Category Base Price Rating Status Featured Action

Room Configurations

Manage individual hotel room inventory, night pricing, capacity details, and availability status.

Room Type Hotel Property Room No. Price/Night Capacity Beds Inventory Status Action

Platform Bookings

Review reservations, manage check-in workflows, process cancellations, and handle refunds.

Booking ID Guest Details Hotel & Room Check-in / Out Total Price Booking Status Payment Action

Registered Users

Review database customers, inspect booking history, and manage profile status.

User ID Name Email Address Phone Registered On Role Account Status Action

Review Moderation

Moderate customer reviews, delete spam ratings, and post official manager replies.

User Hotel Rating Review Content Submitted On Status Action

Offers & Coupons

Configure marketing discount codes, expiry guidelines, and usage thresholds.

Code Discount (%) Expiry Date Usage Limit Times Used Min Spend Required Status Action

Payments & Transactions

Audit invoice transactions, configure payment gateway settings, and handle manual refund requests.

Transactions Ledger

Transaction ID Booking ID Guest Name Method Amount Payment Status Date

Gateway Configuration

Reports & Performance

Export reservation files, track occupancy rates, and evaluate monthly platform revenue.

Audit & Security Logs

AI Booking Intelligence

Ask our booking intelligence assistant for room pricing optimization and insights.

AI Support Chat

Hello! I am your AI Booking assistant. I analyze occupancy and pricing. Type your question below!

Automated Insights

Price Alert Munnar: Weekend occupancy is projected to reach 92%. Recommend raising rates by 12%.
High Demand Beachfront: The Riverside Retreat has received 3 cancellations. Re-listing immediately.
